metadata.description: Antigravity CLI integration for Claude Code — delegate tasks to Google's `agy` from inside your editor.

plugins.name: agy
plugins.description: Use the Google Antigravity CLI (`agy`) from Claude Code — slash commands /agy:setup, /agy:ask, /agy:delegate, /agy:research, /agy:review, /agy:image, /agy:help. Supports per-call model selection via --model.
